title: poa annua var. supina
intro: Poa annua var. supina, also known as blue poa or prairie bluegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa annua var. supina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
